Notice And Request For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-20-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Nathaniel Dunn, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 140 SOUTH HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CHRISTOPHER CANDIA SR., TRUSTEE OF THE CHRISTOPHER CANDIA SR. REVOCALBE TRUST UDT OCTOBER 30, 2008.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Sam McKee sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $31,106.11
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,000.00
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $595.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $35,526.11
Judgment signed in open court.
